Scenario 1 · ✅ Fixed
Giant Dimensions / Luxury Home
大平层 — 尺寸溢出 / Clamp
Dimension clamp + ROOM_DIMENSION_OUT_OF_RANGE dimensionConfidence=ROUGH Snapshot invalidation
爱炫耀，大平层，张口就来，尺寸完全不靠谱。 Loves to show off — luxury condo, throws out wildly unrealistic numbers.
Dialogue · 对话记录
S来来来，坐，喝点水。今天不急啊，咱一步一步把您家厨房大概弄出来。Come on in, have a seat, grab some water. No rush today — we'll lay your kitchen out one step at a time.
C我跟装修公司都谈三个月了，图纸改了八版，头都大了。今天就想看看你们这个东西能整出个啥样。I've been going back and forth with my contractor for three months — eight versions of the drawings, it's giving me a headache. Today I just want to see what this thing of yours can do.
S那正好，咱这个快，五分钟出个大概。先从尺寸开始。Perfect — this one's quick, rough layout in five minutes. Let's start with the dimensions.
Room · 尺寸
S厨房长度大概多少？英寸英尺都行，记不太清也没事，先填个大概。Roughly how long is the kitchen? Inches or feet — and if you're fuzzy on it, just ballpark for now.
C长度啊……我家那个大，一进去就老长一条。一千英尺总有吧。The length? My place is big — you walk in and it just keeps going. Gotta be a thousand feet at least.
S（笑）一千英尺……那宽度呢？[laughs] A thousand feet… and the width?
C宽八百。哦不对不对，差不多 100 乘 8000 那么大。Width's eight hundred. No wait — more like 100 by 8000.
S（输入 12000 × 8000）[Inputs 12000 × 8000]
✅ System Length/width exceeds 600" max → clamped + pushes ROOM_DIMENSION_OUT_OF_RANGE: "Dimensions exceed typical range — adjusted to max, please verify."
S大哥，一千英尺那是个足球场，您厨房再大也不至于能跑圈。系统先帮您压到最大值了，回头拿尺子量个准的我再改，不耽误。Sir — a thousand feet is a football field; the kitchen's big but you can't run laps in it. The system capped it at the max for now. Measure it properly later and I'll update — no problem.
C那这图会不会画歪了？数字不准的话。But will the drawing come out wrong? If the numbers aren't exact?
S不会，这一轮就是出个大致布局，比例对就行，精确尺寸是下一轮的事。层高知道吗？No — this round is just the rough layout, as long as the proportions are right. Exact measurements come next round. Do you know the ceiling height?
C层高没量过，空着吧。Never measured the ceiling. Leave it blank.
System Ceiling height empty → Confirmation Required; dimensionConfidence = ROUGH
Openings · 开口
S有门吗？几个？Any doors? How many?
C一个门，前边进来那个。对了后墙还有一扇大窗户，景观好得很。One door, the one you come in through at the front. Oh — and a big window on the back wall, gorgeous view.
Layout · 布局
S厨房什么型？L 型、U 型、一字型，还是走廊型？What's the layout — L-shape, U-shape, single wall, or galley?
C必须 U 型啊。我这么大厨房整个一字型那不丢人嘛。中间再给我来个大 island。U-shape, no question. A kitchen this size with a single wall? Embarrassing. And put a big island in the middle.
Appliances · 电器
S电器呢？水槽、灶、冰箱、洗碗机都要？烤箱是单独的 wall oven，还是带灶那种？Appliances? Sink, range, fridge, dishwasher all in? And the oven — separate wall oven, or the range type?
C都要都要，全套顶配。Wall oven 单独的，上面再叠个 microwave，叠一起显得高级。All of it, top of the line. Separate wall oven, with a microwave stacked on top — looks high-end stacked.
Adjust Positions · 调整
S（生成）您看，门在前面，窗在后墙，island 在正中间。[Generate] Here you go — door at the front, window on the back wall, island dead center.
C嗯……冰箱能挪到左边那面墙吗？我习惯一进门顺手就够着冰箱。Hmm… can you move the fridge to the left wall? I like grabbing the fridge right as I walk in.
S（拖冰箱到左墙）行，挪过去了。[Drags fridge to left wall] Sure — moved.
C这一挪不会把刚才那些都弄乱吧？Moving it won't mess up everything we just did, will it?
S不会乱。不过布局动过了，刚才那张图就作废了，我得重新生成一次才能往下走。Nothing gets messed up. But since the layout changed, that earlier plan is void now — I'll regenerate before we move on.
System After drag → existing snapshot invalidated; must regenerate before rendering.
Expected Floor Plan
U-shape + island + fridge dragged to left wall. Dims clamped; snapshot must regenerate.
AI Concept Rendering · 效果图API
gpt-image · U-shape, warm-white frameless, island, OV/MW tower. Concept only — not for production.
Verification · 验证点
Scenario 2 · ⚠️ Open
Terminology Confusion (Door vs. Open Passage)
术语不懂 — door vs. open passage
DOOR vs OPEN_PASSAGE distinction Exemption rule UNKNOWN_ISLAND_STATUS
英文术语一问三不知，老要解释，答非所问。 Not familiar with cabinet terminology. Needs everything explained. Often answers a different question.
Dialogue · 对话记录
Room · 尺寸
S咱开始啊，厨房长宽大概多少？Let's get started — roughly how long and wide is your kitchen?
C这我哪知道啊……一般人家都多少？你给我定一个吧，我对这些数字真没概念。Oh gosh, I have no idea… what do most people have? Just pick one for me — I really don't have a sense for these numbers.
S没事，我按常见的来，180 × 120，回头您在家量一下，不对咱再改。No problem — I'll use a common size, 180 × 120. Measure it at home later and we'll adjust if it's off.
Openings · 开口
S有门吗？另外有没有 open passage？Is there a door? And do you have an open passage?
COpen passage……啥意思？是说墙上有个洞吗？我家墙好好的没洞啊。Open passage… what's that mean? Like a hole in the wall? My walls are fine, there's no hole.
S（笑）不是洞。就是那种没有门扇的开口，比如厨房通客厅，中间没装门，直接走过去那种。[laughs] Not a hole. It's an opening with no door panel — like where the kitchen flows into the living room and you just walk through, no door hung there.
C哦——那有那有！一个真门在那边，然后通餐厅那个口就是没门，直接过去的。Oh — yes, I've got that! One real door over there, and the way through to the dining room has no door, you just walk through.
System door=YES + open passage=YES → drawn independently; neither replaces the other.
S窗户呢？在哪面墙？What about windows? Which wall?
C有窗，但具体哪面墙……我得回去看，平时真没注意。There's a window, but which wall exactly… I'd have to go look. Never really paid attention.
System Window wall unknown → Confirmation Required. Doors/windows allowed on any wall (exemption rule).
Layout · 布局
S布局是 L 型还是 U 型？（画给她看）就这种拐个角的。Is the layout L-shape or U-shape? [shows a sketch] — this kind, where it turns a corner.
C就那个拐角的，左边那种。说实话这些词我真不太懂，感觉得先上个培训班才会装修。The corner one, on the left. Honestly I don't really get all these terms — feels like I need to take a class before I can renovate.
S您别担心，我帮您翻译，您只管说习惯。要不要 island？Don't worry, I'll translate it all — you just tell me how you live. Do you want an island?
CIsland 是个啥？是一种柜子的款式吗？What's an island? Is it, like, a style of cabinet?
S不是款式，就是厨房正中间那个独立的大台子，跟餐厅里中间那张大桌子似的，可以备菜也可以坐人。Not a style — it's that freestanding counter in the middle of the kitchen, like the big island table in a restaurant. You prep on it, people can sit at it.
C哦原来是那个！这么一说我就懂了。那个啊……我还真没想好要不要。Oh, that thing! Now I get it. That… honestly I haven't decided if I want one.
System island=UNKNOWN → UNKNOWN_ISLAND_STATUS confirmation; no island geometry by default.
Adjust Positions · 调整
C等会儿，那个门是不是该往右边点？我家进门那个门是在右手边的。Hold on — shouldn't that door be more to the right? The door I come in through is on my right-hand side.
S（把门拖到右墙）行，挪右边。门放哪面墙都行，不受限制。[Drags door to right wall] Sure, over to the right. A door can go on any wall — no restriction.
C哎，其实没我想的那么复杂嘛。早知道我就不紧张了。Huh — this is way less complicated than I thought. I was nervous for nothing.
Expected Floor Plan
Door on right wall (exemption). Open passage on front wall. Window wall TBD.
AI Concept Rendering · 效果图API
gpt-image · L-shape, sage shaker, open passage. Concept only — not for production.
Verification · 验证点
Scenario 3
"I Want Everything" — Max-Out Customer
「都有都有」最大化 — U型 + 全家电 + 叠塔
U_SHAPE + island + WALL_OVEN_MICROWAVE_STACK Cooktop on island
什么都要，全 yes，财大气粗。 Wants every feature. Budget is not a concern. Says yes to everything.
Dialogue · 对话记录
C你先看这个。（掏出手机）我在 Instagram 上刷到的，就要这种感觉，全开放、中间一个大岛台，看着特有派。Look at this first. [pulls out phone] I saw it on Instagram — I want exactly this vibe. Wide open, big island in the middle, super impressive.
S这个好做，您这空间也够。咱先把框架搭起来——长宽多少？That's very doable, and you've got the space for it. Let's frame it up first — what are the length and width?
Room · 尺寸
C240 乘 180，我家厨房大。层高 108 英寸，我特意量过。240 by 180 — big kitchen. Ceiling's 108 inches, I measured it specially.
S量过好，省事。那咱直接进电器。Great that you measured — saves us time. Let's go straight to appliances.
Appliances · 电器
S烤箱要单独的 wall oven，还是带烤箱的灶？For the oven — separate wall oven, or a range with the oven built in?
C单独 wall oven，要高端的。上面再叠一个内嵌 microwave，叠成一个塔。对了我还想要个 wine fridge，再来个 warming drawer。Separate wall oven, high-end. Stack a built-in microwave on top — a whole tower. Oh, and I want a wine fridge too, and a warming drawer.
SWine fridge、warming drawer 这些咱都能上，不过那是下一轮排细的时候加，这一轮先把主结构和标准电器定下来。烤箱微波塔我先给您记上。Wine fridge, warming drawer — we can absolutely add those, but they come in next round when we detail it out. This round we lock the main structure and the standard appliances. I'll note the oven-microwave tower now.
C行，那塔肯定要。Fine — but the tower's a must.
System wallOven=YES + microwaveOvenCombo=YES → ovenMicrowave.configuration = WALL_OVEN_MICROWAVE_STACK. Wine fridge / warming drawer = out of Round 1 scope, noted for Round 2.
S水槽、冰箱、洗碗机都要吧？Sink, fridge, dishwasher — all in?
C都要，全套。Island 要大的，灶给我放 island 上，我就想站中间做饭，朋友坐对面陪我聊天。All of it, the works. Big island — and put the cooktop on the island. I want to cook in the middle with friends sitting across from me.
C那灶放岛上，是不是得在天花板上装个排烟的？If the cooktop's on the island, don't I need an exhaust hood on the ceiling?
S得装，岛上灶一般配吊顶式抽油烟机——不过那是 Round 2 的事，这一轮先把灶放上去，确认布局放得下。You would — an island cooktop usually pairs with a ceiling-mounted hood. But that's Round 2 territory; this round we just place the cooktop and confirm the layout fits it.
Adjust Positions · 调整
S（把 cooktop 拖到 island 上）放上去了，系统不会让它跟别的硬叠在一起。[Drags cooktop to island] On the island now — the system won't let it hard-overlap anything else.
C哎全塞进去了还真都放得下！比我想的宽敞。Wow, it all fits — and it's roomier than I pictured!
System Full appliances + stacked tower + island cooktop → no errors; clearance displacement active.
Expected Floor Plan
OV+MW stacked tower. Cooktop dragged to island. No overlaps.
AI Concept Rendering · 效果图API
gpt-image · island cooktop, navy frameless, OV/MW tower. Concept only — not for production.
Verification · 验证点
Scenario 4
Vague / "Leave It Blank" — UNKNOWN Fields Don't Block
全程模糊留白 — UNKNOWN 不阻断流程
All UNKNOWN → Confirmations accumulate without blocking notForProduction=true
什么都「差不多」「不知道」「你来定」，毫无数据。 "I don't know," "whatever's standard," "you pick" — the answer to everything.
Dialogue · 对话记录
C不好意思啊，我今天是临时进来看看的，啥都没准备，也没量过尺寸，是不是有点不靠谱。Sorry — I just popped in on a whim today, didn't prepare anything, never measured. Is that going to be a problem?
S完全没事，先看个大概，量了再补。咱慢慢来。Not at all — we'll do a rough pass and fill in the real numbers later. No pressure.
Room · 尺寸
S厨房长度大概有印象吗？Any rough sense of the kitchen length?
C嗯……可能十五英尺？不对，那是带着餐厅算的还是不带？哎我也搞不清，一般人家多大你给我填一个吧。Um… maybe fifteen feet? Wait, is that with the dining area or without? Ugh, I can't keep it straight — just put whatever's typical.
S宽度和层高呢，有数吗？Width and ceiling height — any idea?
C真不知道，都空着吧。这样会不会出问题啊？Honestly no clue — leave them blank. This won't cause a problem, will it?
S不会，系统会先用一套默认值，每个空着的地方都帮您记个「待确认」，照样能往下走。No — the system drops in default values and tags each blank as "to confirm." We can still keep going.
System All dims missing → each generates a Confirmation item; flow continues.
Openings · 开口
S门窗呢？大概记得不？Doors and windows — do you remember roughly?
C门应该有吧……肯定有门，人总得进去。窗户嘛，我想想——也不太确定，怕说错。There's a door… there has to be, you've got to get in somehow. A window, let me think — I'm not sure, don't want to tell you wrong.
S没事，不确定的我都标上待确认，您回家瞄一眼告诉我就行。That's fine — anything you're unsure of I'll flag to confirm. Glance at home and just let me know.
System Door unknown + window unknown → UNKNOWN_DOOR_STATUS + UNKNOWN_WINDOW_STATUS
Layout · 布局
S布局有偏好吗？L 型、U 型……Any layout preference? L-shape, U-shape…
C没想法，你帮我选个好看的吧。Island 要不要……我也拿不定主意，怕选错了后面拆起来麻烦。No idea — pick a nice one for me. An island… I can't decide, I'm scared of choosing wrong and having to tear it out later.
S这一轮选错也不要紧，随时能改，咱先出个草图给您找感觉。Choosing wrong this round is no big deal — it's all changeable. Let's just generate a draft so you get a feel for it.
C啥都没填你居然真能出图？那我就放心了。You can actually generate something with nothing filled in? Okay, that puts me at ease.
System layoutPreference=NO_PREFERENCE; island=UNKNOWN → confirmation item; notForProduction=true
Expected State — All UNKNOWN
All UNKNOWN still generates a shell. notForProduction=true; full confirmation list.
AI Concept Rendering · 效果图API
gpt-image · generic default (all fields blank). Concept only — not for production.
Verification · 验证点
Scenario 5
Managing Rendering Expectations
渲染期望管理 — AI 出图边界
Render gate: color × style matching Quota −1 / 403 QUOTA_EXCEEDED
急性子，催出图，对结果挑刺。 Impatient. Jumps straight to "show me the picture." Picks at rendering quality.
Dialogue · 对话记录
C我直说啊，街对面那家给我看的效果图，跟照片一样真，你们这个能做到那样吗？I'll be straight with you — the place across the street showed me renderings that looked like real photos. Can yours do that?
S咱这个是快速概念图，定位不一样——先帮您把布局和风格感觉确认下来。信息我先录：长 200 宽 150，层高 96，一个门两扇窗，L 型不要 island，水槽冰箱灶洗碗机都有，对吧？Ours is a fast concept render — different purpose; it's to lock down layout and the feel of the style first. Let me enter it: length 200, width 150, ceiling 96, one door two windows, L-shape no island, sink fridge range dishwasher all in — right?
C对对对，就这样，快点，我一会儿还有事。Yes yes yes, that's it — hurry, I've got somewhere to be.
Rendering · 效果图
C直接出效果图吧。Just generate the rendering.
S得先选门板款式和颜色才能解锁出图。We need to pick a door style and color first — that's what unlocks rendering.
C哎哟这么多步骤。行，就这个颜色，出吧！Oh come on, so many steps. Fine — this color, go!
S这个颜色是 Frameless European 系列的，您门板款式得选对应的那套才解得开，不然按钮是灰的。That color belongs to the Frameless European line — your door style has to match that set to unlock it, otherwise the button stays greyed out.
System Color must match cabinetStyle → button stays locked on mismatch.
C好好好，款式改对了，出！Okay okay, fixed the style — generate!
System Rendering generated with concept/not-for-production watermark; quota −1.
C这台面看着怪怪的，颜色也不太对，而且那边怎么空了一块？对面家可没这毛病。The countertop looks off, the color's not quite right, and why's there a blank patch over there? The place across the street didn't have this issue.
S这是 AI 生成的概念图，主要让您感受风格和配色方向，它偶尔会留白、细节也不精确——不是最终施工效果。真正的精修图在签约后那一轮做。This is an AI concept image — it's there to convey the style and color direction. It occasionally leaves gaps and the details aren't exact; it's not the final result. The polished render happens in the round after you sign.
C那再出一张，多出几张我挑挑。（连点了好几下）Then run it again — give me a few to choose from. [clicks several times in a row]
S出图每月有个次数额度，您这刚好点到上限了。没关系，我跟后台说一声给您加几次，或者咱先用这张往下走。There's a monthly cap on renders, and you've just hit it. No worries — I can ask the back office to bump your limit, or we can move forward with this one for now.
System Monthly renders ≥ quota → 403 QUOTA_EXCEEDED; friendly message; admin can raise limit.
Expected Floor Plan
L-shape. Color × style mismatch locks render button.
AI Concept Rendering · 效果图API
gpt-image · L-shape, light-oak frameless. Concept only — not for production.
Verification · 验证点
Scenario 6
Stacking / Recessed Appliance Design Limits
堆叠嵌墙边界 — 叠塔 + clearance 让位
ovenMicrowave tower representation Recessed → Round 1 confirmation Clearance displacement
纠结细节，问得很具体，盯着图较真。 Detail-oriented. Stares at the floor plan and pushes back on anything that looks off.
Dialogue · 对话记录
C我先说啊，我 YouTube 看了一堆装修视频，做了不少功课，有几个问题挺具体的。Heads up — I've watched a ton of renovation videos on YouTube and done my homework, so I've got some pretty specific questions.
S好啊，您尽管问，懂行的客户我最喜欢了。Great — ask away. Customers who've done their research are my favorite.
Appliances · 电器
C我要把 microwave 装在 wall oven 正上方，叠成一个塔。它俩在图上会不会互相压到？I want the microwave directly above the wall oven, stacked into a tower. On the plan, will the two overlap each other?
S垂直叠没问题，系统认它是一个「烤箱微波塔」。只有水平方向才讲究不重叠，会自动让位。Vertical stacking is fine — the system treats it as one "oven-microwave tower." Overlap only matters horizontally, and there it offsets automatically.
C那这个塔会不会影响上面那排吊柜的进深？视频里说叠塔得占额外空间。Does the tower affect the depth of the upper cabinets above it? A video said stacks eat extra space.
S会占整面的柜位，这一轮先按一个塔的整体占位画，进深这种精确数是 Round 2 排细节才算。It takes the full cabinet position, yes. This round we draw it as one combined footprint; exact depth gets calculated in Round 2 detailing.
System Stack → WALL_OVEN_MICROWAVE_STACK tower, not two independent floating rects.
Adjust Positions · 调整
C我那个冰箱是嵌进墙里的，recessed，跟普通凸出来那种不一样。图上能画出区别吗？我特意挑的嵌入式，得体现出来。My fridge is recessed into the wall — different from a regular proud one that sticks out. Can the plan show that difference? I picked built-in on purpose, it should be reflected.
S嵌入和凸出是很精确的细节，Round 1 这张粗图暂时不区分，看着是一样的方块。我给您标个待确认。Recessed vs. proud is a fine detail — Round 1's rough plan doesn't distinguish them yet, so it shows as the same block. I'll flag it to confirm.
C那你可得给我写下来啊，别到时候忘了，我这个嵌入式是花了大价钱的。Then write it down, please — don't let it slip. That built-in cost me a fortune.
S放心，系统已经记成「待确认」了，Round 2 量尺寸时一定会跳出来，跑不掉。Don't worry — the system's already logged it as "to confirm." It'll pop up the moment we measure in Round 2. It won't get lost.
System Recessed/proud → Confirmation Required; deferred to Module 2.
C我把冰箱往灶那边拖一点，会不会冲突？If I nudge the fridge toward the range, will they conflict?
S（拖冰箱靠近灶）您看，系统自动给挤开了，留出间距，不会硬叠。[Drags fridge toward range] See — the system pushes them apart and keeps clearance. No hard overlap.
C嗯，这个自动让位的逻辑做得不错，比我想的严谨。Hm, the auto-clearance logic is well done — more rigorous than I expected.
System Drag toward overlap → clearance displacement active; no items clip.
Expected Floor Plan
OV/MW tower (right wall). Fridge offset by clearance. Recessed flagged TBD (amber dot).
AI Concept Rendering · 效果图API
gpt-image · recessed fridge, OV/MW tower, charcoal framed. Concept only — not for production.
Verification · 验证点
Scenario 7
Narrow Galley Kitchen (Space-Anxious Customer)
走廊型小厨房 — 面积焦虑
SINGLE_GALLEY · 65" too narrow for double row COUNTERTOP oven: no cabinet slot
租户，厨房很小，有点不好意思，觉得不够上档次。 Renter with a small kitchen. A little self-conscious and half-apologetic about the size.
Dialogue · 对话记录
C我先打个预防针啊，我那厨房是真的小，租的房子，你们这种高级展厅的设计估计也施展不开。Fair warning — my kitchen is genuinely tiny, it's a rental, and a fancy showroom like this probably can't do much with it.
S哎您可别这么说，小厨房我反而最有兴趣。您平时都做点啥？爱下厨吗？Don't sell it short — small kitchens are the ones I find most interesting. What do you usually cook? Are you into it?
C爱啊，就是地方小，一个人转身都费劲。长度大概……130 英寸吧。I love cooking — there's just no room, I can barely turn around. The length is maybe… 130 inches?
S宽度呢？And the width?
C窄，也就 65？就一条走廊，一边操作台，另一边是堵墙。Narrow — like 65? It's basically a hallway, counter on one side, wall on the other.
System layoutPreference=SINGLE_GALLEY; width 65"; island not applicable.
S那就是单排走廊型，65 宽双排排不下，island 就不考虑了。So it's a single-run galley — 65 inches is too narrow for a double row, and an island's off the table.
Cisland？（笑）我那厨房进个人都得侧身，放 island 是想让我贴墙走啊。An island? [laughs] I have to turn sideways just to walk in — an island would have me shuffling along the wall.
Appliances · 电器
S冰箱什么样的？What's the fridge like?
C小号的，apartment-size 那种，具体宽多少我没量过。Small — apartment-size. I never measured the exact width though.
System Fridge width unknown → MISSING_FRIDGE_WIDTH confirmation.
S洗碗机和烤箱呢？Dishwasher and oven?
C洗碗机没有，真放不下。烤箱就台面上那种小烤箱，不是嵌进柜子的。No dishwasher — truly no room. The oven's just a little countertop one, not built into a cabinet.
System oven=COUNTERTOP → does not consume wall cabinet space.
C话说我这么小的厨房，真能配上好看的柜子吗？还是说就只能将就。Honestly, can a kitchen this small even get nice cabinets? Or am I stuck just making do?
S说句实在话，我做过最出彩的几个厨房都是小的。空间小，每一寸都用心，反而出效果。Honestly? Some of the best kitchens I've ever designed were the small ones. When every inch counts, you get something really special.
Rendering · 效果图
C哇……这个比我想象中好太多了！我那破厨房还能这么好看？Whoa… this is so much nicer than I imagined! My dingy little kitchen can look like that?
S对，小厨房用浅色、统一门板最显大。您看这一下子就敞亮了。Yep — light colors and uniform doors open a small kitchen right up. See how much airier it feels?
C等下我拍张照，发给我对象看看，他肯定不信这是咱家。Hold on, let me snap a photo to send my partner — there's no way they'll believe this is our place.
Expected Floor Plan
Single-run galley. Open passage both ends. Countertop oven no cabinet slot (dashed). Fridge width TBD.
AI Concept Rendering · 效果图API
gpt-image · narrow galley, white, countertop oven. Concept only — not for production.
Verification · 验证点
Scenario 8
Mid-Flow Layout Change (L → U)
中途改主意 — L 型改 U 型，快照作废
layout patch → snapshot invalidated → re-generate Patch chain intact
爱后悔，看到图才知道自己要什么。 Indecisive. Needs to see the picture before knowing what they actually want.
Dialogue · 对话记录
First Pass · 第一次
S布局想好了吗？Have you settled on a layout?
CL 型，不用想，我以前家就是 L 型，用了十几年顺手得很。Island 不要，占地方。L-shape, no need to think about it — my old place was L-shape, used it for over a decade, fits me perfectly. No island, it just eats floor space.
System layoutPreference=LEFT_L_SHAPE; island=NO.
S（生成）出来了，您看看。[Generate Cabinet Fill] Here it is — take a look.
C嗯……（盯着看了一会儿）挺好的，就是右边这块地儿空着，是不是有点浪费？Hmm… [stares for a moment] It's nice, but that area on the right is just empty — feels a bit wasted, no?
S右边再加一排柜子就成 U 型了，要不要我给您比一下？Add a run on the right and it becomes a U-shape. Want me to show you the comparison?
C看看……哎你说我这要不要改 U 型？可我都用惯 L 型了……算了，改！改 U 型！我就想看看。Let me see… ugh, should I switch to U-shape? But I'm so used to L… you know what, change it! U-shape! I just want to see it.
System Patch layoutPreference → U_SHAPE; old snapshot invalidated; must re-generate.
Regenerated · 重新生成
S（重新生成）U 型来了，三面墙都是柜子，台面也多了一截。[Regenerate] Here's the U-shape — cabinets on all three walls, and you've gained a stretch of countertop.
C哎哟，这个是好看多了，台面也宽敞。早知道一开始就选这个了。Oh wow, that's a lot better, and so much more counter space. Should've gone with this from the start.
C等等，那我们刚才弄的那些是不是白做了？电器啥的都没了？Wait — did everything we just did go to waste? Are the appliances and all gone?
S没白做。改布局只是把上一张图作废，您填的门窗、电器这些都跟着带过来了，我重新生成时全接上了。Nothing's wasted. Changing the layout only voids the previous plan — your doors, windows, appliances all carry over; the regenerate stitched them right back in.
C那就好那就好。就 U 型了，这次我不改了！Oh good, good. U-shape it is — I'm not changing it again this time!
Before / After — L → U
L → U patch invalidates snapshot immediately. Re-generate produces correct three-wall U.
AI Concept Rendering · 效果图API
gpt-image · final U-shape after L→U change. Concept only — not for production.
Verification · 验证点
Scenario 9
Sales Entry Error + Customer Correction
销售录错 + 客户纠正 — 两次 patch
Two patches: width + door wall Steam oven → confirmation
眼尖，盯着屏幕，发现「这不对啊」，直接指出。 Observant. Watches the screen. Quietly spots errors and points them out directly.
Dialogue · 对话记录
Error #1 · 尺寸录错
S咱开始，长宽多少？Let's begin — length and width?
C长 180，宽 120。我都量好了写在手机备忘录里。Length 180, width 120. I measured it all and saved it in my phone notes.
S（手一快录成 210）好，180 乘 210，层高 96。[fingers slip, types 210] Got it — 180 by 210, ceiling 96.
C诶等会儿，那个宽度怎么显示 210？我说的是 120 啊。Hey, hold on — why's the width showing 210? I said 120.
S哎哟手快录错了，眼真尖，我马上改。Oops — my fingers got ahead of me. Good eye. Fixing it right now.
C没事没事，谁都有手误的时候。No worries, happens to everyone.
System Patch width 210 → 120; snapshot invalidated if one exists.
Error #2 · 门位录错
S门和窗在哪面墙？Which walls are the door and window on?
C门在右边那面墙……诶你刚标到后墙了？后墙是窗户，门是右边的。The door's on the right wall… hey, did you just put it on the back wall? Back wall's the window — the door's on the right.
S对，您说得对，右边是门，后墙是窗，我调过来。You're right — door on the right, window on the back. Swapping them now.
C（笑）要不今天我来打字，你在旁边盯着得了。[laughs] Maybe I should be the one typing today, and you can supervise.
S（笑）行，您盯着我我反而踏实。[laughs] Honestly, you keeping an eye on me makes me feel better.
System Patch door back → right wall; back wall door cleared; back wall window added.
Appliances · 电器
C对了，我那个烤箱是蒸汽的，steam oven，不是普通烤箱。你看（翻出手机照片），就这个，嵌在柜子里的。Oh — my oven is a steam oven, not a regular one. Look [pulls up a photo on phone], this one, built into the cabinetry.
S嵌入式蒸汽烤箱，好，我记上。这种是非标款，具体型号和尺寸 Round 2 量了再定，我先标个待确认。Built-in steam oven — noted. It's a non-standard unit, so the exact model and dimensions we'll pin down in Round 2; I'll flag it to confirm for now.
C行，这个一定别漏了，我老婆就稀罕这个。Sure — just don't lose track of it. My wife's obsessed with that thing.
System steamOven=YES (non-standard) → Confirmation Required for model/dimensions.
Expected Floor Plan — After Both Fixes
180×120, door on right wall, window on back wall. Steam oven flagged TBD.

gpt-image · U-shape, steam oven, greige frameless. Concept only — not for production.
Verification · 验证点
Scenario 10
Fridge Outside Kitchen + Impatient Customer
冰箱在外 + 催图 — 跳步 + PII 边界
fridge=OUTSIDE_KITCHEN → not on floor plan Skipping steps PII boundary
没耐心，就想看图，冰箱放在餐厅。 Short attention span. Keeps asking "can we see the picture yet?" Fridge is in the dining room.
Dialogue · 对话记录
C我先说啊，我十二点半还有个饭局，咱能快则快。Heads up — I've got a lunch at 12:30, so let's make this as fast as possible.
S没问题，五分钟搞定。咱先填基本信息，长宽——No problem, five minutes tops. Let's start with the basics — length and width——
C等会儿，能不能先出张效果图让我看看风格？我就想知道好不好看。Hold on — can you generate a rendering first so I can see the style? I just want to know if it looks good.
S出图得有信息打底才行，没数据它画不出来。您配合我两分钟，长度多少？A rendering needs the info underneath it — without data there's nothing to draw. Give me two minutes — what's the length?
C行行行，190。宽 140。层高不知道，跳过跳过。Fine, fine — 190. Width 140. Ceiling, no idea, skip it, skip it.
System Ceiling unknown → Confirmation; flow continues.
Appliances · 电器
C那现在能出图了吧？信息不少了。Can we render now? That's already a fair bit of info.
S就差电器了，您要不报一下，三十秒。水槽、灶有吧？Just the appliances left — rattle them off, thirty seconds. Sink, range, yes?
C水槽灶都有。冰箱不在厨房里，在餐厅那边——我家厨房是开放式的，连着餐厅，冰箱就摆在餐厅靠墙，厨房塞不下。Sink and range, yes. The fridge isn't in the kitchen — it's over in the dining room. My kitchen's open-plan, flows into the dining area, and the fridge sits against the dining-room wall; no room in the kitchen.
S明白，那我标成「冰箱在厨房外」，平面图里就不画它，也不给它留柜位。Understood — I'll mark it "fridge outside the kitchen." It won't be drawn on the floor plan and no cabinet space gets reserved for it.
System fridge=OUTSIDE_KITCHEN → excluded from floor plan; no cabinet space reserved; Confirmation Required.
C好了好了，这下总能出图了吧？我真要迟到了。Okay, okay — now can we render? I'm genuinely going to be late.
S最后一步，把电器位置摆一下就解锁了，您喝口水的功夫我就弄好。Last step — I'll place the appliances and it unlocks. Done before you finish your water.
PII Edge Case · 边界
C对了，你们这系统是不是连着我的账户？我上次留的手机号、地址啥的，是不是都在这能看到？By the way — is this system linked to my account? The phone number and address I left last time, can you pull all that up in here?
S看不到。这个工具只管厨房设计的数据——尺寸、布局、电器这些，您的手机号、地址都在另外的客户系统里，跟这边是分开的。No. This tool only handles kitchen-design data — dimensions, layout, appliances. Your phone number and address live in a separate customer system, kept apart from this one.
C那行，分开的我放心。好，赶紧出图，我看一眼就走。Good — separate is reassuring. Alright, render it quick, one look and I'm off.
System ✅ Intake snapshot contains no PII fields. PII query correctly deflected.
Expected Floor Plan — Fridge Outside
Fridge outside room boundary (dashed, faded). No cabinet slot. Kitchen plan unaffected.

gpt-image · open-plan, no fridge in kitchen. Concept only — not for production.
